objective.summary: Implement C2b read-layer dedup by making read_dataset and read_canonical keep one prices row per (symbol, trade_date), preferring catalog latest_manifest_run_id and using deterministic source_run_id fallback.
non_goals: Do not physically migrate, delete, merge, or rename run_id partitions
Do not write or modify market_data/catalog.py, manifest.py, lake_layout.py, normalization.py, publish.py, or data/lake/**
Do not execute runtime, provider, NAS, QMT, real lake, or published pointer advance operations
Do not claim S29 full PIT/dedup correctness beyond S07 fixture scope

feature_contract_summary: FEAT-02 read side owns read_dataset/read_canonical semantics. S07 inserts dedup after parquet concat and before caller filters so downstream S05/S06 readers consume a deduplicated prices frame.

cr_delta.summary: Adds read-layer dedup helper, source-run ordering, partition-run fallback, and fixture tests for prices duplicate keys.

acceptance: read_dataset(DATASET_PRICES) returns duplicate key count 0 by (symbol, trade_date)
source_run_id lexicographic descending provides deterministic fallback when catalog current is missing
missing source_run_id degrades to path run_id with issue
missing dedup keys degrades without blocking and records issue
read_canonical reuses the same dedup logic
No physical partition migration or forbidden file writes
verification_plan: uv run --python 3.11 pytest -q tests/test_cr139_s01_inventory.py tests/test_cr139_s02_golden_baseline.py tests/test_cr139_duplicate_fingerprint_profiling.py tests/test_cr139_published_pointer.py tests/test_cr139_pit_as_of_reader.py tests/test_cr139_panel_reader.py tests/test_cr139_read_layer_dedup.py tests/test_cr014_catalog_publish_gate.py tests/test_cr014_p0_pipeline_contract.py
